message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "sidetree-core-go" as Client1
participant "Instance 1" as Instance1 {
    participant "Operation Queue" as OpQueue1
}
participant "orb.operation" as OrbOp as queue
database "op-queue DB" as DB
participant "Instance 2" as Instance2 {
    participant "Operation Queue" as OpQueue2
}

Client1 -> OpQueue1 : Add(op1)
activate OpQueue1
OpQueue1 -> OrbOp : Publish(op1)
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue1 : ok
deactivate OrbOp
OpQueue1 --> Client1 : ok
deactivate OpQueue1

Client1 -> OpQueue2 : Add(op2)
activate OpQueue2
OpQueue2 -> OrbOp : Publish(op2)
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue2 : ok
deactivate OrbOp
OpQueue2 --> Client1 : ok
deactivate OpQueue2

OpQueue1 <- OrbOp : op2
activate OpQueue1
OpQueue1 --> OrbOp : ok
deactivate OpQueue1

OpQueue1 -> DB : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> OpQueue1 : ok
deactivate DB

OpQueue1 -> OrbOp : Ack(op2)
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue1 : ok
deactivate OrbOp

OpQueue2 <- OrbOp : op1
activate OpQueue2
OpQueue2 --> OrbOp : ok
deactivate OpQueue2

OpQueue2 -> DB : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> OpQueue2 : ok
deactivate DB

OpQueue2 -> OrbOp : Ack(op1)
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue2 : ok
deactivate OrbOp

' Subscriptions
OpQueue1 -> OrbOp : Subscribe
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue1 : ok
deactivate OrbOp

OpQueue2 -> OrbOp : Subscribe
activate OrbOp
OrbOp --> OpQueue2 : ok
deactivate OrbOp

actor "sidetree-core-go" as Client2
participant "Operation Queue" as OpQueue3
participant "orb.operation" as OrbOp2 as queue
database "op-queue DB" as DB2
participant "Operation Queue" as OpQueue4

@enduml
```
